value.body:
## Context

The API and UI have issue, comment, record, history, revision, and diff surfaces, but the product needs one dependable issue detail workflow for daily use.

## Outcome

Users can open a ticket and see the current description, metadata, comments, linked records, activity timeline, history, and revision/diff context without leaving the detail surface.

## Acceptance criteria

- Issue detail shows title, body, type, status, priority, assignee, labels, parent, and timestamps.
- Comments and linked records can be added from the detail view and refresh without a full app reload.
- History and diff/revision views are reachable from the ticket detail surface.
- Loading, empty, stale, and failure states are explicit and recoverable.
- Add focused tests for renderer DTO mapping and API/usecase behavior touched by the workflow.

frontmatter.title: Build resilient issue detail surface with comments, activity, and history

value.title: Build resilient issue detail surface with comments, activity, and history
